ClassificationLevel.description: U.S. Government classification markings permitted on an OPORD banner.
ClassificationLevel.title: ClassificationLevel

DataSourceMeta.description: Provenance header carried by every standalone data-source document.

title.description: Document title (e.g. 'JPITL for OP IRON STRIKE').
title.title: Title

classification.description: Classification level of this data source.

anyOf.description: Military date-time group in DDHHMMZMONYY form (e.g. '181200ZAPR26').

as_of_dtg.description: Date-time group the data was current as of.
as_of_dtg.title: As Of Dtg

DataSourceMeta.title: DataSourceMeta

HVT.description: High-Value Target (or High-Payoff Target when hpt_nomination is True) per ATP 3-60.

priority_rank.description: Rank-ordered priority within the HVT/HPT list (1 = highest).
priority_rank.title: Priority Rank

category.description: Warfighting-function category the target belongs to.
category.title: Category

target_description.description: Narrative description of the target: system, unit, facility, or individual.
target_description.title: Target Description

signature.description: Detectable signature(s) of the target (electronic, thermal, visual, pattern-of-life).
signature.title: Signature

likely_locations.description: MGRS grids or named areas where the target is most likely to appear.
likely_locations.title: Likely Locations

engagement_guidance.description: Commander's guidance for engaging this target (restrictions, priority, delivery).
engagement_guidance.title: Engagement Guidance

linked_pir.description: PIR numbers whose answer depends on observing or engaging this target.
linked_pir.title: Linked Pir

hpt_nomination.description: True when the target is nominated to the High-Payoff Target List (HPTL).
hpt_nomination.title: Hpt Nomination

HVT.title: HVT

meta.description: Provenance metadata for this data source.
